llm.summary: The task is complete in substance. The implementation adds Prisma/SQLite wiring, migrations, generated client setup, deterministic db preparation, idempotent endpoint seed defaults, generated schema documentation, and repeatability coverage. The inspected changes stay scoped to endpoint persistence and do not add out-of-scope UI, MCP, REST, auth, or reset behavior. I did not rerun write-producing commands in this read-only evaluator sandbox, but the provided deterministic check summary reports all required gates passing.
satisfied_exit_criteria: `npm run db:prepare` is implemented via `scripts/db-prepare.mjs`, which creates `data/`, applies Prisma migrations, generates Prisma Client, and runs seed defaults.

Repeatability is covered by `tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts`, which runs `db:prepare` twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular seeded endpoint, parameter, and response-case rows.

`prisma/schema.prisma` can represent immutable endpoint IDs, names, titles, descriptions, enabled state, delete codes, default responses, timestamps, ordered parameters, response cases, and basic endpoint/case failure config fields.
`docs/generated/db-schema.md` matches the implemented `Endpoint`, `EndpointParam`, and `ResponseCase` models and seed defaults.
The supplied required checks passed: `npm run db:prepare`, `npm run test:unit`, and `npm run verify`.
The task maps directly to `docs/product-specs/endpoint-tool-management.md` as the endpoint persistence foundation.

summary: The task is complete in substance. The implementation adds Prisma/SQLite wiring, migrations, generated client setup, deterministic db preparation, idempotent endpoint seed defaults, generated schema documentation, and repeatability coverage. The inspected changes stay scoped to endpoint persistence and do not add out-of-scope UI, MCP, REST, auth, or reset behavior. I did not rerun write-producing commands in this read-only evaluator sandbox, but the provided deterministic check summary reports all required gates passing.
